name: HITCValidateExchange
title: HITC Validate Exchange Operation
description: Validates an incoming Bundle through R-SCH, R-REF, R-TERM, and the quality-metrics collector.
purpose: Defines the API contract for the composable validation pipeline; no completed production service is claimed.
comment: The operation is a requirements-level contract for future implementation.

parameter.name: bundle
parameter.documentation: Incoming source or canonical Bundle to validate.

parameter.name: strict
parameter.documentation: When true, profile, reference, and terminology errors fail the transaction.

parameter.name: result
parameter.documentation: Validated canonical exchange Bundle including quality metric Observations and Provenance. The returned Bundle SHALL conform to https://example.org/fhir/li-xinyang-interop-r4/StructureDefinition/hitc-exchange-bundle.
